title: verbascum × zlataroffii
intro: Verbascum × zlataroffii, also known as Zlataroff's mullein, is a hybrid species of the Verbascum genus, derived from the cross between Verbascum blattaria and Verbascum phoeniceum. This biennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × zlataroffii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Verbascum × zlataroffii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile and valuable plant in natural remedies.
